en.extract:
The fiery-breasted bushshrike (Malaconotus cruentus) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae.
It is found throughout the African tropical rainforest.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.

The '''fiery-breasted bushshrike''' ('''''Malaconotus cruentus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Malaconotidae]].
It is found throughout the [[Tropical forest|African tropical rainforest]].
Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical dry forest]] and [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].
